The family Annonaceae is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Pterotheca marschalliana belonging to the subfamily Annonoideae. Overall, the classification of Pterotheca marschalliana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants in the Magnoliales order.
